title: Zebra (ZBRA) Up 19.5% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Zebra (ZBRA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Zebra Technologies' (ZBRA) Solution Chosen by Rockland Trust
text: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) offers its Zebra Workcloud software solutions to boost Rockland Trust's customer experience by improving branch operations, and increasing visibility and communication.

title: Rockland Trust Bank Selects Zebra Technologies to Modernize Branch Operations
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Rockland Trust Bank selects Zebra Technologies to modernize branch operations.

title: Zebra Technologies Makes Computerworld's 2024 List of Best Places to Work in IT
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies ranks #35 among top large organizations globally on Computerworld's 2024 List of Best Places to Work in IT.

title: Tech's Best Kept Secrets: 7 Under-the-Radar Stocks to Watch
text: When looking at the broader innovation space, it's the usual suspects that helped drive sentiment forward, which may provide an “air bubble” opportunity for under-the-radar tech stocks. Basically, with so much attention paid to a select few enterprises, investors can pivot toward the path less traveled.

title: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Unveils Android-Based Mobile Computers
text: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) launches HC20 and HC50 Android-based handheld mobile computers, which broaden the company's healthcare solutions portfolio.

title: Here's Why Hold Strategy is Apt for Zebra Technologies (ZBRA)
text: Strength in the Asset Intelligence and Tracking segment and accretive acquisitions augur well for Zebra Technologies. The company's measures to reward its shareholders are encouraging.

title: Zebra Technologies' New Healthcare-Grade Mobile Computers Elevate Patient Care
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies' new rugged HC20 and HC50 handheld mobile computers support unique needs of the healthcare industry.

title: Strong Large-Cap Insider Buys: Q3 2023
text: The article discusses sizable insider purchases in Q3 of this calendar year. Insiders at Exxon Mobil, Zebra Technologies, The AES Corporation, and Broadcom have shown unusual interest in their own companies' stock, buying large amounts in the third quarter. After about three or four consecutive quarters of primarily discussing oil and gas stocks, the insider buying in that sector appears to have slowed a bit.

title: Zebra Technologies Appoints Richard Hudson as Chief Revenue Officer
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a leading digital solution provider enabling businesses to intelligently connect data, assets and people, today announced Richard Hudson has been named Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). Hudson previously served as Senior Vice President and General Manager for the Europe, Middle East and Africa (EMEA) region. He succeeds Joe Heel who has served as the company's CRO since 2014. “We are pleased to have Richard join our.

title: Why Zebra Technologies Stock Lost 11.5% Last Month
text: Analyst firm BNP Paribas gave an underperform rating to the stock, presumably worried about a distribution network clogged with oversupply. Revenue dropped 31% in the third quarter, but met the company's own expectations.

title: Zebra Technologies to Present at Investor Conferences
text: LINCOLNSHIRE, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $ZBRA--Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ: ZBRA), a leading digital solution provider enabling businesses to intelligently connect data, assets, and people, today announced that the company will present at three investor conferences: Tues., Nov. 7 at 10:50 a.m. U.S. central time at the Baird 2023 Global Industrial Conference in Chicago, Illinois; Thurs., Nov. 16 at 9:00 a.m. U.S. central time at the Stephens Annual Investment Conference in Nashville, Tennessee;.
